title: at/make/with + UnboundParameterError + Factory serialize
manager: The factory's construction API — pure `at(n)` (the instance at a coordinate), cursor `make()` (the next instance), immutable-curry `with()` (bind some parameters, defer the rest) — plus `UnboundParameterError` that lists every parameter you forgot, and a serialize contract capturing source hash, bindings, seed, and cursor. This is what makes factories ergonomic and resumable: a clear error for missing parameters, and a construction state you can save and continue.
cs: pure `at(n)` / cursor `make()` / immutable-curry `with()`; UnboundParameterError lists all unbound; serialize {source_hash, bindings-as-text, seed, cursor}.
